tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsBatchSearchLinkProcesses
tools.description: Retrieve information about LineageProcesses associated with specific links. LineageProcesses are transformation pipelines that result in data flowing from **source** to **target** assets. Links between assets represent this operation. If you have specific link names, you can use this method to verify which LineageProcesses contribute to creating those links. See the SearchLinks method for more information on how to retrieve link name. You can retrieve the LineageProcess information in every project where you have the `datalineage.events.get` permission. The project provided in the URL is used for Billing and Quota.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsProcessesList
tools.description: List processes in the given project and location. List order is descending by insertion time.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsProcessesRunsLineageEventsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the lineage event with the specified name.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsProcessesRunsLineageEventsGet
tools.description: Gets details of a specified lineage event.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsProcessesRunsLineageEventsList
tools.description: Lists lineage events in the given project and location. The list order is not defined.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsProcessesRunsList
tools.description: Lists runs in the given project and location. List order is descending by `start_time`.

tools.name: projects.datalineageProjectsLocationsSearchLinks
tools.description: Retrieve a list of links connected to a specific asset. Links represent the data flow between **source** (upstream) and **target** (downstream) assets in transformation pipelines. Links are stored in the same project as the Lineage Events that create them. You can retrieve links in every project where you have the `datalineage.events.get` permission. The project provided in the URL is used for Billing and Quota.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
